plan.title: Document the Deft-company / Directive-product model and npm install paths

narratives.Description: Resolve the #423 tail: add the user-visible 'Deft is the company, Directive is the product' note and reframe the primary install paths around npm (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`; `directive` command with `deft` alias). The Go installer stays documented as the bootstrap path during the staged-retire window. This is the docs surface for the Wave-2 distribution change; the full #761 README/UPGRADING reframe remains Wave 4.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add a concise identity-model note (Deft = company/org/scope/.deft footprint; Directive = product/bin) to README.md and the getting-started content.
2. Add the npm install/quickstart paths (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `npx @deftai/directive ...`, `directive`/`deft`) alongside the existing installer path, marked as the emerging canonical channel.
3. Verify with `node packages/cli/dist/bin.js verify links` (no broken links) and a docs read-through confirming the identity note + install paths are present.
narratives.UserStory: As a new directive user, I want the docs to state plainly that Deft is the company and Directive is the product and to show the npm install path, so that I understand the naming and can install via npm.

narrative.Acceptance: When README and getting-started are read, then a clear 'Deft = company, Directive = product' note is present and consistent with the @deftai/directive naming.
When the install docs are read, then `npm i -g @deftai/directive` and the `directive`/`deft` command are documented as the emerging canonical channel alongside the installer.
When `directive verify links` runs over the edited docs, then it returns exit 0 with no broken references.

expected_outputs: Identity-model note (Deft=company / Directive=product) in README + getting-started
npm install/quickstart paths documented as emerging canonical channel
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Resolves #423 (identity-model doc tail) + Wave-2 install-path surface under #11/#1669; documentation with no spec-section trace.

references.title: Issue #11: NPM + PIP CLI distribution (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `pipx install deft-cli`)
